title: cyrtomium laetevirens
intro: Cyrtomium laetevirens, also known as the netted polypody, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyrtomium laetevirens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves can be dried and processed into teas, tinctures, or infusions for various medicinal purposes.
